title: Clinostigma mooreanum

This family consists of approximately 189 genera and over 2,600 species, making it one of the largest and most diverse plant families. intro: Clinostigma mooreanum, also known as the Pacific island fan palm, is a species of palm tree endemic to the Pacific islands, characterized by its distinctive fan-shaped leaves.
